name: Siaroppskuake (Anise Syrup Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Dark corn syrup or Watermelon syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine butter and sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg and beat. Then add honey and syrup.
3. Gradually stir in dry ingredients, alternating with cream.
4. Knead into a ball and chill in the refrigerator.
5. Roll into small balls using the palm of your hand. Place on a greased baking sheet about 1-inch apart.
6. Bake at 375°F for 8-9 minutes, depending on size (nine minutes ensures a more rounded shape when cool).
7. Glaze over a cooling rack by mixing together 2 cups powdered sugar and 1/2 cup hot milk until smooth. Keep warm in a double boiler.
